what_it_does: The React root component for ConceptV Studio. Holds all app-level state (mostly via window.usePersisted: inbox, generated icons, extra colors, color/pattern edits, locked tokens/patterns, saved templates/rewrites, workshop docs, workspace vars, snapshots), wires global behaviours (Cmd/Ctrl+K command palette, a tb-open custom event, window.cvNav for prop-drill-free navigation, registry/image/openai subscriptions for re-render), applies colorEdits and patternEdits live to :root CSS custom properties, computes sidebar counts + a recent-activity feed, and routes the `active` string to one of ~17 canvas components, rendering the shell (Sidebar / main canvas / ChatRail / Toast / ExportPatch / CommandPalette / SaveAsTypeModal). Mounts itself with ReactDOM.createRoot guarded by getElementById('app').
observations: Destructures React.useState/useEffect with _app-suffixed aliases (useState_app, useEffect_app) — a guard against name collisions in a shared global-scope bundle.

Persistent state goes through window.usePersisted(key, default); ephemeral UI state (active, exportOpen, paletteOpen, sidebarCollapsed, pendingBrief, pendingWorkshopDoc, tbTypeId) uses plain useState.
colorEdits effect sets --${name} on document.documentElement; patternEdits effect sets or removes --${name} — confirming the 'simple --name: value protocol' for colors/spacing/radii/shadows/motion.
Bridges to many global stores: CV_REGISTRY, cvImageStore, cvOpenAI, CV_ICONS, WS_DOCS, WS_VARS, cvStudioStorage, dsaToast, cvNav.

counts has several HARDCODED base numbers: colorCount 20+extras, componentCount 14+gen, typeCount 3, logoCount 4, patternCount 13+7+6+5 (=31, with an inline comment), templateCount 3+saved, voiceCount 7, gaps 3, healthScore 86+....
recentActivity mixes real derived entries (adopted icons, last color edit, last template) with two FIXED placeholder rows ('Brand Kit updated — added 2 logos', 'Voice rule ... added').
Router is a long if/else if chain mapping active → a specific canvas component with tailored props; unknown active falls back to <StubCanvas/>.
ChatRail is rendered for every surface EXCEPT 'registry' (active !== 'registry').
tb-open event and window.cvNav are cross-canvas escape hatches to navigate/open the TypeBuilder without prop drilling.
Several useEffect hooks subscribe but their returned cleanup is the subscribe() return value (relies on the store returning an unsubscribe fn).
standouts: Live token editing: colorEdits/patternEdits write straight to :root custom properties, so the registry-as-truth tokens can be overridden at runtime from the UI and cascade everywhere.
The UI is a projection of registries — sidebar counts and re-renders are driven by subscribing to CV_REGISTRY / cvImageStore / cvOpenAI rather than local duplicated state.
Global cvNav + tb-open event implement cross-surface routing without prop drilling.
conventions: Follows the project's loud/single-source intent: tokens edited via :root vars, stores subscribed not copied.
Self-mounting guarded by `if (_mountApp)` — exactly the DOM-guard the project CLAUDE.md requires for shared-bundle .jsx.
Aliased React hook imports to avoid global-scope collisions (no module system / classic-script bundle).
Breaks tidiness with hardcoded count bases and two hardcoded placeholder activity rows.
concerns: Hardcoded magic numbers in counts (20, 14, 3, 4, 13+7+6+5, 7, 3, 86) are baked-in figures that can drift from the real registries they purport to summarize — e.g. typeCount:3 vs typeCountTotal from CV_REGISTRY.all().
Two fixed placeholder rows in recentActivity present fabricated events ('added 2 logos', voice rule) as if real activity.
Subscribe effects assume the store's subscribe() returns an unsubscribe function; if any returns undefined the effect cleanup is a no-op (minor leak risk).
resetSession uses confirm() and location.reload() — a hard, irreversible session wipe behind a single dialog.
notes: The ConceptV Studio React root — owns all persisted app state, applies token edits live to :root, and routes one `active` string to ~17 canvas surfaces inside the three-pane shell.
questions: Are the hardcoded count bases (colorCount 20, patternCount 31, voiceCount 7, etc.) meant to track real registry sizes, or are they fixed display figures?
Should the two placeholder recentActivity rows be removed given the project's no-fiction stance, or are they intentional seed content?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: it is the app root and does the root's job (state ownership, global wiring, surface routing, shell render); the only tension is hardcoded counts/activity vs the system's single-source-of-truth ideal.
apparent_themes: UI as a projection of registries/stores (subscribe, don't duplicate)
Runtime single-source token editing via :root custom properties
Centralized state ownership with prop-drilled canvases plus global escape hatches
intention_signals: Trying to make one root that owns the studio's whole persisted working state and projects it onto a routed set of canvas surfaces, with token edits flowing straight to :root so the design-system's single source can be tuned live and reflected everywhere.
novelty: Editing design tokens directly onto document.documentElement custom properties from React state (colorEdits/patternEdits) so the running app re-skins itself live, combined with usePersisted-backed full-session persistence and global event/cvNav cross-surface routing.
contribution: Contributes the studio's application skeleton: the persisted-state model, the live :root token-edit application, the registry/store subscription wiring, the surface router (active → ~17 canvases), and the shell composition (Sidebar/ChatRail/Toast/Export/CommandPalette/SaveAsType).
summary_for_embedding: The React root of ConceptV Studio: owns persisted app state via usePersisted, applies color/pattern edits to :root CSS variables, subscribes to CV_REGISTRY/cvImageStore/cvOpenAI for counts, handles Cmd+K and cross-surface navigation, and routes an active string to ~17 canvas components inside a three-pane shell.
intention_for_embedding: To be the single root that owns the studio's working state and projects it onto routed canvas surfaces, with live :root token editing so the design system's single source can be tuned and reflected app-wide.
